title: Head of Finance (Central/ Education) JL18
description:
Basic + VB only

Responsibilities:

  1. Serve as the Finance Manager of the Company, a Singapore-based subsidiary of a Group listed on the China A-share market, with overall responsibility for the Company’s finance function and related matters.

  2. Establish, implement and continuously improve the Company's financial management system and internal control system to meet the Group’s standard;

  3. Prepare and review financial documents and reports. Regularly present financial reports and data to the Group as required;

  4. Check the validity and accuracy of contracts and payment documents;

  5. Complete monthly, quarterly and annual tax declarations, annual settlement and payment; research local tax policies and conduct reasonable tax planning;

  6. Conduct financial management of the Company's assets, register ledgers and detailed accounts, conduct regular inventory checks to ensure the integrity and safety of the assets;

  7. According to the Company's strategic plan, cooperate to complete the annual budget and monthly financial and operational analysis, present to the Group;

  8. Promote the construction of financial formalization; take management of accounting files such as vouchers, account books, and reports;

  9. Establish the department’s organization structure and personnel allocation plan, build the talent pool within the department;

  10. Other tasks assigned by the Group.

 Qualifications:

  1. Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field; Master’s degree is an advantage.

  2. Minimum 5 years of relevant work experience; experience in enterprise or group-level environments is an advantage.

  3. CPA, ACCA, or equivalent professional accounting qualification. Strong understanding of accounting standards and regulations applicable to China-listed companies, IFRS, and familiarity with Singapore accounting standards and tax policies is preferred.

  4. High professional integrity with strong communication and stakeholder management skills

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or email ref44@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
